title: periploca ovata
intro: Periploca ovata, also known as Old Man's Beard, is a type of flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region, belonging to the Apocynaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Periploca ovata include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and can be used to support immune function and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
